expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui Dialog components (DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter)
Uses shadcn/ui Popover components (Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent)
Does NOT import directly from @base-ui/react for Dialog or Popover
Includes proper accessibility attributes or relies on shadcn's built-in a11y
expectations.evidence: Line 51: aria-label on help button, focus/blur handlers

expectations.text: Has Cancel and Confirm action buttons in the dialog
